categories.label: Unicode Box Drawing (U+2500-U+257F)
categories.description: All 128 Unicode Box Drawing characters are supported with direct code-point SVG resources. Light lines use one stroke, heavy lines use three close parallel strokes, and double lines use two separated strokes. Set character gap and line gap to `0 px` when adjacent cells must connect.

categories.label: Common Unicode symbol variants
categories.description: Each supported character has its own direct code-point SVG. Filled geometric shapes use an outer boundary plus sparse diagonal hatching. Brackets rotate in vertical layout; arrows preserve their semantic direction.
